raw_text:
HEADER
Wenzhe(Evelyn)Xu
217-417-9270wxu23@illinois.edu|Address:100 24 Ave#3,San Mateo,CA 94403
COREQUALIFICATIONS
MACHINE LEARNING & DEEP LEARNING
Modeling: machine learning (regression, classification, clustering), categorical data analysis, time series analysis. sampling, ANOVA analysis, A/B testing, dimension reduction, model selection
Computer Skill:
Programming:expertise in R (4+yr,dplyr.ggplot2,shiny),Python(1+yr, Scipy,numpy.pandas, scikit-learn), SQL(3+yT)
Read package source code of R and re-organized the logic and input to fit the business metrics data application scenario, with integrating special requirement from business and engineer staff 's execution
Build PPT for presentation and interactive dashboard from Shiny for collecting feedback of the algorithm to team and quick response to additional need from business and engineer colleagues
Build Hadoop cluster of 12 nodes including tuming critical parameters,and was responsible for the maintenance on memory usage andrelated package installation under CentOS6.S Linux environment
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Data engineering: Apache Impala 1.x,Apache Hadoop 2.x, Cloudera CDH 5.x,A pache Spark 1.x
Soffware and system:SAS (Advanced Certified),SPSS,Looker,Linux CentOS6.5),Microsoft Office,Map Reduce
Communication and Presentation:
Meeting with business colleagues and transfer the commereial goal into data-driven objective
Quick response to the later-added requirement from business side
Presentation ofthe modeling result and data insight by PPT and building interactive dashboard through Shiny
Tech-Sale Analyties Intern,Anheuser-Busch Inbev, Champaign,/L
ACADEMIC PROJECTS
Project Management: Able to track each stage according to scheduled timeline for an independent project
Collaborative tasks from other projects
Helped to write mapper and reducer function on word coumt for merchantclassification based on transection records
EDUCATION
EDUCATIONBACKGROUND
University ofIllinoisatUrbana-Champaign
8/2013-5/2015
Master of Science in Statistics-AnalyticsMajor GPA:3.96/4.0
Tianjin University of Finance and Economics,Tianjin,China
9/2009-6/2013
Bachelor of Science in Statistics | Overall GPA: 3.75/4.0 |Major GPA:4.0/4.0
Improved the whole workflow by adding lat/lon information as well as innovative filters to increase mapping accuracy
Wrote and integrated all steps in pipelined R code for fiuture usage and cooperated with 3 party to build dashboard
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
PROFESSIONALEXPERIENCE
Data Scientist Intern,MasterCard Inc.San Carlos,CA
6/2015-12/2015(expected)
Independently designed the automatic anomalies detection system for business metrics time series data
Researched on anomaly detection algorithm and finally choose the S-H-ES D test from Twitter as basic logic
Used Impala/SQL for ETL the data from production, complied the R code into mapper and reducer function in Python with each group id as mapper key, and set up the map-reduce data pipeline job on Oozie
Participated in the Cloudera training on Apache Spark
PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Customer profiling with social media data source and internal wholesaler database
Learned the original algorithm and created advanced string cleaning step for Foursquare/Yelp dat abase
Overcame the challenges of handling Asian languages and popularized the customer profiling project to global market
电 Mentored new interns for taking over the customer profiling work flow
Predicted volume for each POC through logistic models and learning algorithms,identified the influencing POCs
Used regression tree to predict the mumber of pipe needed by the target volume for Belgium on-premise market
Transfer the data analysis result to commercial insi ght and presented to business managers on a regular basis
Overall Highlight: Solid data science background with data engineer skill sets applied in industry Statistical Skill:
markdown:
## HEADER

Wenzhe(Evelyn)Xu
217-417-9270wxu23@illinois.edu|Address:100 24 Ave#3,San Mateo,CA 94403
COREQUALIFICATIONS

## MACHINE LEARNING & DEEP LEARNING

Modeling: machine learning (regression, classification, clustering), categorical data analysis, time series analysis. sampling, ANOVA analysis, A/B testing, dimension reduction, model selection
Computer Skill:
Programming:expertise in R (4+yr,dplyr.ggplot2,shiny),Python(1+yr, Scipy,numpy.pandas, scikit-learn), SQL(3+yT)
Read package source code of R and re-organized the logic and input to fit the business metrics data application scenario, with integrating special requirement from business and engineer staff 's execution
Build PPT for presentation and interactive dashboard from Shiny for collecting feedback of the algorithm to team and quick response to additional need from business and engineer colleagues
Build Hadoop cluster of 12 nodes including tuming critical parameters,and was responsible for the maintenance on memory usage andrelated package installation under CentOS6.S Linux environment

## TECHNICAL SKILLS

Data engineering: Apache Impala 1.x,Apache Hadoop 2.x, Cloudera CDH 5.x,A pache Spark 1.x
Soffware and system:SAS (Advanced Certified),SPSS,Looker,Linux CentOS6.5),Microsoft Office,Map Reduce
Communication and Presentation:
Meeting with business colleagues and transfer the commereial goal into data-driven objective
Quick response to the later-added requirement from business side
Presentation ofthe modeling result and data insight by PPT and building interactive dashboard through Shiny
Tech-Sale Analyties Intern,Anheuser-Busch Inbev, Champaign,/L

## ACADEMIC PROJECTS

### Project Management: Able to track each stage according to scheduled timeline for an independent project
- Collaborative tasks from other projects
- Helped to write mapper and reducer function on word coumt for merchantclassification based on transection records

## EDUCATION

EDUCATIONBACKGROUND
### University ofIllinoisatUrbana-Champaign
**Date:** 8/2013-5/2015
- Master of Science in Statistics-AnalyticsMajor GPA:3.96/4.0
### Tianjin University of Finance and Economics,Tianjin,China
**Date:** 9/2009-6/2013
### Bachelor of Science in Statistics | Overall GPA: 3.75/4.0 |Major GPA:4.0/4.0
- Improved the whole workflow by adding lat/lon information as well as innovative filters to increase mapping accuracy
- Wrote and integrated all steps in pipelined R code for fiuture usage and cooperated with 3 party to build dashboard

## PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

PROFESSIONALEXPERIENCE
### Data Scientist Intern,MasterCard Inc.San Carlos,CA
**Date:** 6/2015-12/2015(expected)
- Independently designed the automatic anomalies detection system for business metrics time series data
- Researched on anomaly detection algorithm and finally choose the S-H-ES D test from Twitter as basic logic
- Used Impala/SQL for ETL the data from production, complied the R code into mapper and reducer function in Python with each group id as mapper key, and set up the map-reduce data pipeline job on Oozie
- Participated in the Cloudera training on Apache Spark

## PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY

Customer profiling with social media data source and internal wholesaler database
Learned the original algorithm and created advanced string cleaning step for Foursquare/Yelp dat abase
Overcame the challenges of handling Asian languages and popularized the customer profiling project to global market
电 Mentored new interns for taking over the customer profiling work flow
Predicted volume for each POC through logistic models and learning algorithms,identified the influencing POCs
Used regression tree to predict the mumber of pipe needed by the target volume for Belgium on-premise market
Transfer the data analysis result to commercial insi ght and presented to business managers on a regular basis
Overall Highlight: Solid data science background with data engineer skill sets applied in industry Statistical Skill:
